title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a Category Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
